title: Johannes's Renaissance：Musket Rebirth
description: Bring Renaissance muskets and objects to Minecraft
body:
![Small Airport with Happy Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e517c27e9b0e7caae7caf4307b4143231149e31f_0.webp)
**_Defend your empire or republic with firearms in your hands! Explore abandoned military factories and chemical laboratories! Fight wits and courage with plague rats and musketeers!_**

**Warning: Some new mobs and mechanics will modify your save, so please back up your save!**

Welcome to Johannes's Renaissance: Musket Rebirth!

This mod is the spiritual successor to the 1.15.2MCreator mod "Johannes' Renaissance", focusing on musket weapons and Renaissance items

List of current mod implementations:

- Renaissance and later firearms (pistols, arquebuses, flintlocks, blunderbuss, hand-cannons, breechloaders, and needle guns) and lead tools
- Military factories and their abandoned variants
- Abandoned churches and hospitals
- Dangerous plague rats
- A test firearm damage system
- A complete system of plague and medicine

Future plans to join:

- A simple set of industrial facilities
- Some Nether and End style gunpowder weapons
- More abandoned or intact buildings
  
Note: The mod was written from scratch with the consent of the original author and did not use the original mod code

Versions below 1.21.6 will not synchronize subsequent updates (2026/2/24).

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e18ac91286fc53f96f2cabcd8ce18cc1fa78e80.png)

Made by mcreator
